data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion links.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the conversion link from lead to customer/order/opportunity. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or confirmations that explicitly demonstrate this conversion process. The existing evidence focuses on customer sign-ups and bookings but lacks the necessary details to confirm that the conversion link requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of conversion link from lead to customer/order/opportunity.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the conversion link from lead to customer/order/opportunity.
